message:
feat(session): add session comparison reports with recurring offenders

Implements generate_comparison_report() producing class/action distribution
changes, recurring offender detection, and drift summaries (mean/median
score drift, worsened/improved counts, overall trend classification).

Closes process_triage-9k8.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
